name: audit-log
description: Audit logging: a global interceptor records who did each mutating request (who/method/path/status) to an audit_logs table. Requires auth.
env: # audit-log: surfaces the admin Audit log page in the dashboard
instructions: Run migrations to create the audit_logs table:  npm run migration:run -w <app>-api
Mutating requests (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) are recorded with the acting user.
List recent entries (requires a session):  curl -b cookies.txt localhost:3000/audit-logs
